response.justification: While this candidate is an accomplished software engineer with 15+ years of experience, the role requires specialized expertise that is fundamentally misaligned with their career. Most critically, the position requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is entirely absent. Additionally, the candidate lacks recent strong C programming skills (last C work was 2014-2015) and has no demonstrated expertise in embedded firmware security, networking protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, NETCONF), or low-level embedded systems. Their career has focused on high-level web services and backend platforms rather than the specialized embedded networking domain this role requires.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (15+ years) across diverse technical domains and languages
Strong demonstrated Linux systems knowledge and familiarity with kernel-level concepts
Proven pattern of rapid technology adoption and ability to contribute across full-stack implementations
concerns: Does not possess native-level Japanese language proficiency (stated as required qualification)
Minimal recent C programming experience; last embedded/C work was in 2014-2015, with subsequent focus on TypeScript/JavaScript
No background in embedded firmware security, network switch development, or security/networking protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, NETCONF)
